name: John Thune
stanceSummary: Track AIPAC reports an Israel Lobby Total of $1,081,083 for John Thune in U.S. Senate, SD. Public statements and congressional records indicate an Israel-focused security policy posture in recent conflict framing. This candidate has taken funding from the Israel lobby.

timeline.event: Track AIPAC congressional listing records Israel Lobby Total: $1,081,083.
